Apple___Apple_scab.symptoms: Dark olive-green spots on leaves, velvety texture, leaves may curl and drop
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply fungicides like captan or myclobutanil. Remove fallen leaves. Prune for air circulation.
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Plant resistant varieties. Apply preventive fungicides in spring. Keep area clean of debris.

Apple___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown spots with concentric rings on leaves, rotting fruit with black coloring
Apple___Black_rot.treatment: Remove infected fruit and cankers. Apply captan or thiophanate-methyl fungicides.
Apple___Black_rot.prevention: Prune dead wood. Remove mummified fruits. Maintain good air circulation.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.symptoms: Yellow-orange spots on leaves, small tubes on leaf undersides
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.treatment: Apply myclobutanil or triadimefon fungicides during spring.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Remove nearby cedar/juniper trees. Plant resistant varieties.

Apple___healthy.treatment: No treatment needed. Continue regular care.
Apple___healthy.prevention: Maintain proper nutrition, watering, and pest monitoring.

Blueberry___healthy.prevention: Maintain acidic soil pH and proper drainage.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves and fruit
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur-based or potassium bicarbonate fungicides.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Improve air circulation. Avoid overhead watering.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot_Gray.treatment: Apply strobilurin or triazole fungicides. Use resistant hybrids.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot_Gray.prevention: Crop rotation. Tillage to reduce residue. Plant resistant varieties.

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.symptoms: Reddish-brown pustules on both leaf surfaces
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.treatment: Apply foliar fungicides if severe. Use resistant hybrids.

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.symptoms: Long cigar-shaped gray-green lesions on leaves
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.treatment: Apply fungicides at early stages. Remove infected debris.
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Use resistant hybrids. Crop rotation. Proper spacing.

Grape___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown circular lesions on leaves, shriveled black fruit
Grape___Black_rot.prevention: Remove mummified berries. Prune for air circulation.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).symptoms: Interveinal striping on leaves, dark spots on berries
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).treatment: Remove infected vines. Apply wound protectants after pruning.
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).prevention: Avoid large pruning wounds. Use clean pruning tools.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.symptoms: Brown spots with dark borders on leaves
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.treatment: Apply copper-based fungicides. Remove infected leaves.
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.prevention: Good air circulation. Proper spacing between vines.

Grape___healthy.prevention: Regular monitoring and proper vineyard management.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).symptoms: Yellowing of leaves, lopsided fruit, bitter taste
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).treatment: No cure. Remove infected trees. Control Asian citrus psyllid.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).prevention: Use certified disease-free nursery stock. Control psyllid vectors.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Water-soaked spots on leaves, sunken lesions on fruit
Peach___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Plant resistant varieties. Avoid overhead irrigation.

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small dark spots on leaves and fruit
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Apply copper-based bactericides. Remove infected plants.

Potato___Early_blight.symptoms: Dark brown concentric ring spots on lower leaves
Potato___Early_blight.prevention: Crop rotation. Remove plant debris. Adequate fertilization.

Potato___Late_blight.symptoms: Water-soaked spots, white mold on leaf undersides
Potato___Late_blight.treatment: Apply metalaxyl or chlorothalonil. Destroy infected plants.
Potato___Late_blight.prevention: Plant resistant varieties. Avoid overhead irrigation. Good drainage.

Squash___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur or potassium bicarbonate sprays.
Squash___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Proper spacing. Resistant varieties. Morning watering.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.symptoms: Dark purple spots on leaves, drying edges
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.treatment: Remove infected leaves. Apply captan fungicide.
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.prevention: Proper spacing. Avoid overhead watering. Clean planting material.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small dark raised spots on leaves and fruit
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Apply copper sprays. Remove infected plants.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use disease-free seeds. Crop rotation. Avoid overhead watering.

Tomato___Early_blight.symptoms: Dark brown spots with concentric rings on lower leaves
Tomato___Early_blight.prevention: Mulch around plants. Stake for air flow. Crop rotation.

Tomato___Late_blight.symptoms: Large irregular water-soaked patches, white mold
Tomato___Late_blight.treatment: Apply metalaxyl-based fungicides. Remove affected plants.
Tomato___Late_blight.prevention: Plant resistant varieties. Good air circulation. Avoid wet foliage.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.symptoms: Yellow spots on upper leaf surface, olive-green mold below
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.treatment: Improve ventilation. Apply copper or chlorothalonil fungicides.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.prevention: Reduce humidity in greenhouse. Space plants properly.

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.symptoms: Small circular spots with dark borders and gray centers
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.prevention: Remove lower leaves. Mulch. Crop rotation.

Tomato___Spider_mites_Two-spotted_spider.symptoms: Tiny yellow spots, fine webbing on leaves, leaf bronzing
Tomato___Spider_mites_Two-spotted_spider.treatment: Apply miticides or insecticidal soap. Introduce predatory mites.
Tomato___Spider_mites_Two-spotted_spider.prevention: Maintain humidity. Avoid dusty conditions. Regular monitoring.

Tomato___Target_Spot.symptoms: Brown spots with concentric rings, target-like pattern
Tomato___Target_Spot.prevention: Improve air circulation. Remove infected debris.

Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.symptoms: Upward curling yellow leaves, stunted growth
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.treatment: Remove infected plants. Control whitefly vectors.
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.prevention: Use resistant varieties. Reflective mulch. Whitefly management.

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.treatment: Remove infected plants. No chemical cure available.
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.prevention: Use resistant varieties. Sanitize tools. Avoid tobacco near plants.

Tomato___healthy.prevention: Proper watering, staking, and pest monitoring.
